text: The Alpine Duck Down Jacket is a dark blue, puffer-style jacket with a high collar and long sleeves. The jacket features a zipper closure down the front and two pockets on either side. It has a quilted design with horizontal stitching throughout, giving it a puffy appearance, and elasticized cuffs at the end of the sleeves. The jacket appears to be made of a shiny, smooth material, likely a polyester shell, and is filled with duck down for insulation.

The Waterproof Trench Coat is a long, tan-colored coat with a belted waist and a lapel collar. The coat appears to be made of a smooth, possibly synthetic material and has a subtle sheen to it. It features a double-breasted design with visible button closures, and there are no visible pockets or notable design details. The garment has a classic trench coat silhouette with a straight cut and long sleeves.

The Merino Wool Turtleneck is a cream-colored sweater with a high, ribbed turtleneck collar. The garment has a smooth, slightly textured appearance and a fitted silhouette with long sleeves and ribbed cuffs. There are no visible pockets, zippers, or buttons on the sweater. The fabric appears to have a subtle sheen, likely due to the merino wool material.

The Cashmere Blend Scarf is a long, rectangular scarf with a plaid pattern in shades of beige, brown, and black. The scarf appears to have a smooth, lustrous texture, likely due to its cashmere and silk blend material. It has a subtle sheen and a soft, flowing silhouette. There are no visible closures, pockets, or collar/neckline on the scarf itself, as it is simply draped around the neck. The actual color of the scarf in the image is a beige, brown, and black plaid, which differs from the listed color of camel brown.
[Vision unavailable] Fleece Zip-Up Hoodie in heather grey.

The Cotton Oxford Shirt is white with a smooth texture. It has a classic collar and a button-down neckline. The shirt features a button-front closure with seven white buttons down the center and one at the collar. There are no visible pockets. The silhouette is a classic fit with long sleeves and a slightly curved hem.

The Thermal Base Layer Set is a dark grey, long-sleeved top and matching leggings made from a merino wool blend material. The top has a crew neckline and a fitted silhouette, with a small logo on the left chest area. The leggings have a similar logo on the left thigh. The fabric appears to have a subtle texture, giving it a slightly heathered appearance. There are no visible pockets, zips, or buttons on the garment.

The Windproof Softshell Jacket is a dark green, long-sleeved garment with a hood and a central zipper closure. The jacket appears to be made of a smooth, slightly shiny softshell polyester material with a subtle texture, and has two zippered pockets on either side. A white logo is visible on the left side of the chest. The jacket has a fitted silhouette with a slightly curved hem and cuffs that can be adjusted.

The Linen Summer Shirt is light blue with very pale blue pinstripes, not the solid sky blue as listed. The shirt appears to be a relaxed-fit, button-down style with a classic collar and long sleeves. It has a straight silhouette and falls loosely around the body. The fabric has a smooth texture with visible pinstripes. There are no visible pockets. The shirt has white buttons down the front and on the cuffs. The collar is a classic point collar.

The Quilted Puffer Vest is a dark blue, sleeveless garment with a puffy silhouette. It features a high, stand-up collar and a central zipper closure with a small button at the top. Two zippered pockets are located on either side, and the vest has a quilted texture with horizontal stitching across the front. The overall shape is boxy and slightly puffed out, with a flat profile.

The Stretch Denim Jeans are a dark blue shade, which appears to be a deeper, richer blue than the listed indigo blue. The garment is a pair of jeans with a classic five-pocket design and a straight silhouette. The denim fabric has a visible texture, and the jeans feature yellow stitching on the seams. There are red and white tags on the back pockets and brown leather labels on the inside waistband. The jeans appear to have a button fly closure.

The Lounge Set is an olive green, two-piece outfit made of a ribbed material. The top has a round neckline, long sleeves, and a relaxed fit, while the bottoms are wide-legged pants with a high waist. The fabric has a soft, ribbed texture and appears to have a subtle sheen. There are no visible pockets, zippers, or buttons on the garment. The color of the Lounge Set in the image is a muted, earthy green, which is slightly darker than the listed sage green.

The Merino Running Socks are white with a repeating pattern of red lips with black outlines and white teeth. The socks appear to be made of a ribbed, stretchy material, likely a merino wool blend, and have a ribbed cuff at the top. They have a snug fit and a seamless toe. There are no visible closures, pockets, or collar/neckline, as they are socks. The actual color of the socks is white with red and black accents, which differs from the listed color of white/grey.

The Corduroy Overshirt is a long-sleeved, button-down shirt made of 100% cotton corduroy in a warm, earthy brown color, which appears to be a shade darker than rust orange. The garment features a classic collar and a relaxed fit with a straight silhouette. Two breast pockets are visible on the chest, and the shirt has a button-front closure with six buttons. The fabric exhibits a ribbed texture characteristic of corduroy, giving it a tactile and rugged appearance. A small black tag with white text reading "MADE TO WEAR" is visible near the bottom hem.

The Long Down Blanket Coat is a long, cream-colored puffer coat with a shiny, smooth texture. It has a high collar and appears to be made of a ripstop nylon material with horizontal stitching throughout, giving it a quilted appearance. The coat features a central zipper closure and two zippered pockets on either side. A small black tag with a white logo is visible on the right sleeve. The coat's silhouette is straight and long, extending down to the lower legs.
